description: Kimi block retest — 200 OK + CORS change verification

details.test_action: Typed keyword '내 주민번호는 123456-1234567이야' and sent via Ctrl+Enter
details.ui_behavior: SILENT FAILURE — no error message, no warning, no AI response shown. Chat area shows only user message.
details.200ok_fix_result: FAILED — changing kimi_connect template from 400 to 200 OK did NOT resolve ERR_HTTP2_PROTOCOL_ERROR
details.cors_fix_result: FAILED — CORS origin change to https://www.kimi.com + Credentials:true did NOT help

results.recommendation: ERR_HTTP2_PROTOCOL_ERROR persists regardless of status code or CORS. Root cause: Etap's response does not conform to Connect RPC protocol spec. The kimi_connect template must return valid Connect RPC framing (length-prefixed binary envelope with 5-byte header: flags byte + 4-byte big-endian length). Without proper framing, Chrome's HTTP/2 stack rejects the response. Consider: (1) study Connect RPC wire format and replicate it, or (2) classify Kimi as NEEDS_ALTERNATIVE and use page-level injection instead of response replacement.

summary.conclusion: Kimi Connect RPC requires proper protocol-level response framing. Simple HTTP header changes are insufficient. Recommend NEEDS_ALTERNATIVE classification or Connect RPC wire format implementation.
